title: Smoky Vegan Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry made with smoky spices and served over a bed of tapioca.

ingredients.name: Smoky Spices
ingredients.notes: Smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the tapioca and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the smoky spices, soy sauce, and stir fry sauce. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the tapioca is coated in the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with additional smoky spices if desired.
